decisions.reason: Avax::bootInternal() is the framework composition root — the highest-level entry point that wires the entire application object graph. Allowed per how-to-runtime-composition.md §4 and §6.3.
decisions.mitigation: Only top-level boot function. No nested method within this flow may perform additional discovery or assembly.

decisions.reason: AssembleRuntime::assemble() IS the Container composition assembly boundary — it builds the entire runtime object graph. This is the definition of a composition root.
decisions.mitigation: Only the assembly method. No other method in AssembleRuntime may perform discovery.

decisions.reason: OpenAPI component is SCAFFOLD-status per component status lock. Fixing composition leaks is pointless until promoted to ACTIVE.
decisions.mitigation: Must be fixed as part of SCAFFOLD→ACTIVE promotion gate. Must not be used in ACTIVE production code paths.

decisions.reason: ResolveRequest is a data object (DTO), not a runtime service. Container internal autowiring resolution path. Allowed per how-to-runtime-composition.md §6.2 — direct new is permitted for data/DTO objects.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Application/Container/System/Capabilities. Must not leak into runtime execution flows outside Container.

decisions.reason: DependencyRegistration is a registration data object, not a runtime service. This is the container's internal registry factory. Registration-time operation, not runtime execution.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Container registration paths. Must not be used in Flows/Capabilities outside Container.

decisions.reason: Decorator fallback inside registry decorate() method. This is called during ServiceProvider registration, not during request/job/worker execution. Registration-time operation.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Container decorator registration. Must not be used in runtime execution paths.

decisions.reason: ServiceRegistration is a registration data object. Same justification as DependencyRegistry — registration-time factory.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Container registration paths.

decisions.reason: Decorator fallback in ServiceRegistry decorate() method. Registration-time operation, not runtime execution.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Container decorator registration.

decisions.reason: ResolveRequest is a data object. This is the Container's internal callable invocation path. FunctionCaller is part of the Container's execution injection system, not a user-facing runtime flow.
decisions.mitigation: Bounded to Container callable resolution. Must not leak outside Container.

decisions.reason: StateLeakDetector is a diagnostic scanner that inspects runtime state for leaks. It uses class_exists for type discovery during static analysis, not runtime wiring.
decisions.mitigation: Only used for diagnostic scanning. Not in request/job/worker execution paths.

decisions.reason: Failure boundary recovery path. class_exists checks for optional recovery handler availability. This is the failure recovery system itself — discovery is its purpose.
decisions.mitigation: Only checks for handler availability, not service instantiation. Handler must be registered via ServiceProvider if used.

decisions.reason: Policy compilation uses class_exists for discovering registered policy types. Registration-time discovery, not runtime execution.
decisions.mitigation: Only discovers policy types during compilation. Policies must be explicitly registered.

decisions.reason: Health check diagnostic. Uses class_exists to verify policy handler availability.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only. Not in execution paths.

decisions.reason: Health check diagnostic. Same as above — verifies handler availability.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Fallback action execution path. class_exists checks for fallback handler availability during failure recovery.
decisions.mitigation: Only checks availability. Fallback handlers must be registered via ServiceProvider.

decisions.reason: DI container resolution path. class_exists is used for type existence check during dependency resolution. The container's job IS to discover and resolve types — this is its core responsibility.
decisions.mitigation: Container resolution only. Must not leak to user-facing runtime flows.

decisions.reason: DI container service resolution. Same justification as ResolveDependency — container's core purpose is type discovery and resolution.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal only.

decisions.reason: Container blueprint creation. Uses class_exists to validate target type exists before creating blueprint. Registration-time operation.
decisions.mitigation: Registration-time validation only.

decisions.reason: Container service blueprint creation. Registration-time type validation.
decisions.mitigation: Registration-time validation only.

decisions.reason: Container dependency registry. class_exists for type validation during binding registration.
decisions.mitigation: Registration-time operation.

decisions.reason: Container internal type discovery during resolution compilation.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal only.

decisions.reason: Container internal type discovery during resolution compilation.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal only.

decisions.reason: Container service registry. Same justification as DependencyRegistry.
decisions.mitigation: Registration-time operation.

decisions.reason: Container internal type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal only.

decisions.reason: Container internal type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal only.

decisions.reason: Container compilation phase. Uses class_exists to discover resolvable types during dependency graph compilation.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only, not request execution.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery during graph building.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container service compilation — type validation during service graph compilation.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container service compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Main container compilation. The container compiler MUST discover types to build the resolution graph. This is the container's core purpose.
decisions.mitigation: Container compilation phase only. Not request execution.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container compilation — type discovery.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Container resolution policy. Type existence check for resolution strategy selection.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal.

decisions.reason: Container callable resolution. Discovers callable target types for dependency injection.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal callable resolution.

decisions.reason: Container function caller — discovers parameter types for injection. Part of DI execution engine.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal execution path.

decisions.reason: Container function caller — type discovery for injection.
decisions.mitigation: Container internal execution path.

decisions.reason: Container observability policy checker. Diagnostic tool that inspects composition policy state.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic/observability only.

decisions.reason: Container observability policy checker — diagnostic inspection.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Container observability policy checker — diagnostic inspection.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Service provider boot flow. Uses class_exists to verify provider availability before boot. This is the composition root execution phase — discovery is expected.
decisions.mitigation: Boot-time only. Not request execution.

decisions.reason: Schema generation uses class_exists for type introspection during shape compilation. This is metadata compilation, not runtime wiring.
decisions.mitigation: Metadata compilation only.

decisions.reason: Health check diagnostic. Verifies crypto extension availability.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Health check diagnostic. Verifies crypto extension availability.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Attribute compilation uses class_exists for target type discovery during schema compilation. Metadata introspection, not runtime wiring.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time metadata inspection.

decisions.reason: Data shape inspection — type introspection for field type resolution. Metadata compilation.
decisions.mitigation: Metadata introspection only.

decisions.reason: Data shape inspection — type introspection.
decisions.mitigation: Metadata introspection only.

decisions.reason: Data shape schema compilation — type discovery for schema building.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Data shape compiler — type introspection.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Data shape compiler — type introspection.
decisions.mitigation: Compilation-time only.

decisions.reason: Data object creation flow — type discovery for shape compilation. Data transfer layer, not service instantiation.
decisions.mitigation: Data object shape resolution only.

decisions.reason: Database health check diagnostic. Verifies driver availability.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Observability health check diagnostic.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Logging health check diagnostic.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.

decisions.reason: Router health check diagnostic.
decisions.mitigation: Diagnostic only.
